{{< include macros.qmd >}}

# Sintesis {-}

#### Vectores Especiales

| $v, u \in \realsn$ | $\in$            |                                           |
| :----------        | :----------      | :-------------------                      |
| $vv^\top$          | $\Mnn$ (rango 1) | $P_v$                                     |
| $v^\top v$         | $\reals$         | $\inner{v}{v} = \|v\|^2$                  |
| $vu^\top$          | $\Mnn$ (rango 1) | descomposicion RC \ $\chi_A(\lambda) = (-\lambda)^{n-1} (v^\top u - \lambda)$ | 
| $v^\top u$         | $\reals$         | $\inner{v}{u} = \|v\|\|u\|\cos\theta$     |

#### Matrices Especiales

+---------------+------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------+
|               |                              |                                                              |
+===============+==============================+==============================================================+
| Stiefel       | $Q \in \Mmn$\                | - isometría                                                  |
|               | $\trans{Q} Q = I$            | - columnas ortonormales                                      |
|               |                              | - $Q\trans{Q} = P_Q$ (idempotente, invariante en $Q$)        |
+---------------+------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------+
| Ortogonal     | $Q \in \Mnn$                 | - Caso particular de Stiefel, ademas cuadrada                |
|               |                              | - Autovectores ortogonales                                   |
|               |                              | - $Q^{-1}=\trans{Q}$                                         |
|               |                              | - $|\lambda_i| = 1$                                          |
|               |                              | - Isometria (rotacion $\det(Q)=1$, o reflexion $\det(Q)=-1$) |
+---------------+------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------+
| Simétrica     | $S \in \MRnn$\               | - Autovectores ortogonales                                   |
|               | $S = S^\top$                 | - $\lambda \in \reals$                                       |
|               |                              | - $S=Q\Lambda Q^\top$                                        |
+---------------+------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------+
| Hermítica     | $S \in \MCnn$\               | - Autovectores ortogonales (usando $\hermit{v}u$)            |
|               | $S = S^* = \hermit{S}$       | - $\lambda \in \mathbb{C}$                                   |
|               |                              | - $S=Q\Lambda \trans{Q}$                                     |
+---------------+------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------+
| Antisimétrica | $A$\                         | - $\lambda$ imaginario puro o cero                           |
|               | $\trans{A}=-A$               |                                                              |
+---------------+------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------+

#### Proyecciónes y Reflexiónes

|||
| :----------------------                      | :----------------            |
| Proyección de $u$ sobre $v$                  | $u_v = (vv^\top)u$           |
| Proyección de $u$ sobre $v^\perp$            | $u_{v^\perp} = (I-vv^\top)u$ |
| Proyección de $u$ sobre $Q$                  | $QQ^\top u$                  |
| Reflección de $u$ sobre hiperplano $v^\perp$ | $H = (I-2vv^\top)u$          |

#### Factorizaciones

|                       | Hipótesis                         | Origen            |
| :----                 | :------------                     | :------           |
| $A = CR$              |                                   | $AX=X\Lambda$     |
| $A = X\Lambda X^{-1}$ | cuadrada con $n$ Autovectores l.i.|                   |
| $S = Q\Lambda Q^\top$ | cuadrada y simetrica              | Teorema Espectral |
| $A = U\Sigma V^\top$  |                                   |                   |
